# Save More Appliance
> Authorized luxury appliance outlet in Santa Ana, CA. New and open box Sub-Zero, Wolf, Thermador, Bosch, and 20+ brands at wholesale prices.

## Business
- Name: Save More Appliance
- Type: HomeGoodsStore
- Phone: (949) 244-1382
- Address: 1805 E. Dyer Rd. #111, Santa Ana, CA 92705
- Area Served: Santa Ana, Orange County, CA
- Website: https://yourwebsiteexample.com/savemoreappliance/

## Services
- Luxury Appliance Sales
- Open Box Appliances
- Refrigerators
- Ranges and Cooktops
- Dishwashers
- Wall Ovens
- Washers and Dryers
- Outdoor Kitchen Appliances

## Frequently Asked Questions
**What luxury appliance brands do you carry?**
We are an authorized dealer for Sub-Zero, Wolf, Thermador, Bosch, Gaggenau, Monogram, La Cornue, Dacor, ILVE, True, Verona, AGA, Bertazzoni, Vent-A-Hood, Marvel, U-Line, Coyote, Speed Queen, and more.

**What is the difference between new and open box appliances?**
Open box appliances are units that have been returned, used as floor models, or had packaging damaged but are otherwise fully functional. They come with full manufacturer warranties and are inspected and cleaned before sale. You get a luxury appliance at a fraction of retail price.

**Do open box appliances come with a warranty?**
Yes. Our open box appliances carry the full manufacturer warranty. As an authorized dealer, we can sell open box product with warranty coverage intact. This is one of the key advantages of buying from an authorized outlet like Save More.

**Do you ship appliances across the US?**
Yes. We offer shipping throughout the United States. Call us at (949) 244-1382 for a shipping quote on specific items. In-store pickup is also available at both Santa Ana locations.

**What are your hours and where are you located?**
We have two locations in Santa Ana, CA. Our main showroom is at 1805 E. Dyer Rd. #111, Santa Ana, CA 92705. Our second location is at 1947 S. Main St, Santa Ana, CA 92707. Both locations are open Monday through Saturday 10am to 7pm. Closed Sunday.
